data.name: A Night With: Dark-Elf
data.detailed_description:
A Night With: Dark-Elf is a choice-driven adult visual novel about one night where tension, survival, and forbidden desire finally collide. You play as a human adventurer who escaped a prison convoy alongside Nyvara, a sharp-tongued dark-elf fugitive who has spent weeks fighting, hiding, and arguing at your side. The two of you have survived long enough to stop running—just for one night—and whatever has been simmering between you finally comes to the surface.

This isn’t a lighthearted fantasy romp. It’s a slow build of trust, heat, and emotional risk, where every choice shapes how far Nyvara lets you in. Talk with her by the fire, share drinks, tease, push, or hold back. Let the walls between you fall naturally… or shatter the moment with hesitation or reckless hunger.

Your decisions lead to different outcomes: a cold and distant night, a broken moment she won’t forgive, or a raw, explicit, fully consensual encounter where both of you stop pretending.

A Night With: Dark-Elf focuses on grounded dialogue, human chemistry, and explicit adult scenes that reward emotional buildup as much as physical desire.

Key Features:

  • A full standalone adult VN set across one intense, unforgettable night.

  • Character-driven romance and lust centered on Nyvara, a guarded, sarcastic, dangerously attractive dark-elf fugitive.

  • Branching choices that shape trust, heat, and the final outcome of the night.

  • Multiple endings: a cold shutdown, a ruined moment, or a passionate night of explicit intimacy.

  • Progressive escalation from banter and flirting to touching, teasing, service scenes, and explicit sex.

  • Fantasy world with grounded tone, focusing on emotional tension, survival, and forbidden attraction.

data.short_description: A stranded human and a hunted dark-elf share one dangerous night in a forest hideout. Build trust, flirt, push boundaries, and dive into raw adult intimacy as choices lead to desire, rejection, or a burning, unforgettable encounter.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.5 / Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

data.legal_notice:
Developed by: Naughty Narratives
Made with Ren'Py
